llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Supervisor, Technical Sales Display(007326)
job.description: Main Tasks • New Business Development: Identifying, develop, and realizing business opportunities based on customer/market needs including proactive project management from idea to final implementation at customer’s mass production. - Translation of technical customer needs & problems into BASF toolbox to solve customer needs; Provide technical support to customers and technical consultation including handling and follow-up complaints on technical related issues. - Generate selling story and assist commercial sales on achieving business results. - Optimize profitability of regional product portfolio to meet market demand incl. supply chain and local production topics. • Working together with global team to achieve business goals. • Establish close customer relationship for successful business development including product performance test on customers’ product lines and failure analysis of product performance issues at customer. • Provide competitive product performance information to verify competitiveness of own products and technologies. Requirements • Education: Bachelor’s degree in chemistry, physics or material science, Master or PhD is a plus • Experience: Oversea experience or working experience in MNC is a plus • Technical & Professional Knowledge: Know how about chemistry, experience in display materials is a plus; Structured approach to problem solving under time pressure; Excellent communication skill to communicate in an international active company; Ability to interact in an interdisciplinary field of production engineers, QC and supply chain • Languages: Fluent in both written and oral English, Expert level in Chinese 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
